nodes.name: configure.ts
nodes.summary: Interactive CLI command for configuring a Paperclip instance, walking the user through database, LLM, logging, server, storage, and secrets settings via a @clack/prompts wizard.

nodes.name: defaultConfig
nodes.summary: Builds the default configuration object by resolving instance ID, data directories, and default storage/secrets settings.

nodes.name: configure
nodes.summary: Exported command handler that drives the interactive configuration wizard, merging user inputs with defaults and persisting the resulting config file.

nodes.name: db-backup.ts
nodes.summary: CLI command for running PostgreSQL database backups, resolving the connection string and backup directory from config, then delegating to the runDatabaseBackup utility.

nodes.name: dbBackupCommand
nodes.summary: Exported command handler that orchestrates a database backup: resolves config, displays parameters, shows a spinner, runs the backup, and reports the outcome.

nodes.name: doctor.ts
nodes.summary: CLI diagnostic command that runs a suite of health checks (config, auth, secrets, storage, database, LLM, ports) and optionally auto-repairs failed checks.

nodes.name: doctor
nodes.summary: Exported command handler that sequentially runs all system checks, prints per-check results, and concludes with a summary of pass/warn/fail counts.

nodes.name: maybeRepair
nodes.summary: Prompts the user to confirm auto-repair for a failed check, executes the repair function if confirmed, and reports success or failure.

nodes.name: runRepairableCheck
nodes.summary: Runs a health check, prints the result, and conditionally triggers the repair flow and re-check cycle.

nodes.name: env-lab.ts
nodes.summary: CLI subcommands for managing the SSH env-lab fixture (isolated SSH test environment), providing up/down/status/doctor operations registered under the env-lab command group.

nodes.name: registerEnvLabCommands
nodes.summary: Registers all env-lab subcommands (up, status, down, doctor) on the Commander program instance.

nodes.name: collectEnvLabDoctorStatus
nodes.summary: Gathers SSH env-lab fixture health status by checking support availability and fixture state in parallel.

nodes.name: env.ts
nodes.summary: CLI command that collects and displays all environment variables needed for a Paperclip deployment, categorized by source (config file, defaults, computed values) with status indicators.

nodes.name: envCommand
nodes.summary: Exported command handler that reads the config, collects deployment environment rows, and renders them grouped by missing/optional/defined status.

nodes.name: collectDeploymentEnvRows
nodes.summary: Comprehensive function that maps every Paperclip config section to its corresponding environment variable entries, resolving defaults, statuses, and shell-quoting values.

nodes.name: heartbeat-run.ts
nodes.summary: CLI command that executes a shell process with heartbeat pings to a Paperclip routine endpoint, streaming stdout/stderr and reporting the payload back on completion.

nodes.name: heartbeatRun
nodes.summary: Exported command handler that spawns a child process, sends periodic heartbeat updates to the API, streams log output, and reports final execution results.

nodes.name: onboard.ts
nodes.summary: Interactive quickstart/onboarding command that guides a new user through full Paperclip setup: reading environment defaults, prompting configuration choices, and starting the server.

nodes.name: onboard
nodes.summary: Exported command handler orchestrating the full onboarding wizard: resolves env defaults, prompts all configuration sections, writes config, and bootstraps the server.

nodes.name: quickstartDefaultsFromEnv
nodes.summary: Reads environment variables and builds a comprehensive defaults object for all quickstart configuration sections, supporting non-interactive headless setup.

nodes.name: routines.ts
nodes.summary: CLI utilities and commands for managing Paperclip scheduled routines, including embedded Postgres lifecycle helpers and a command to bulk-disable all routines in the config.

nodes.name: ensureEmbeddedPostgres
nodes.summary: Starts or locates a running embedded PGLite/Postgres instance, finding an available port and launching it when not already running.

nodes.name: openConfiguredDb
nodes.summary: Opens a Drizzle database connection using the configured connection string or embedded Postgres, returning both the client and a cleanup function.

nodes.name: disableAllRoutinesInConfig
nodes.summary: Exported function that reads the database and config to find all enabled routines and disables each one, returning a summary of changes made.

nodes.name: run.ts
nodes.summary: CLI run command that imports and starts the Paperclip server module, optionally enabling hot-reload dev middleware and generating a bootstrap invite on first start.

nodes.name: runCommand
nodes.summary: Exported command handler that resolves the server module path, loads the config, starts the server, and optionally generates a bootstrap invite URL.

nodes.name: importServerEntry
nodes.summary: Dynamically imports the server entry module, providing detailed error messages for missing dependencies like missing npm installs.

nodes.name: worktree-lib.ts
nodes.summary: Shared library of pure utility functions for the worktree subsystem: seed mode detection, path resolution, color generation, config building, and shell export formatting.

nodes.name: buildWorktreeConfig
nodes.summary: Builds a complete Paperclip config for a new worktree by cloning and adapting source config with worktree-specific ports, paths, instance IDs, and LLM overrides.

nodes.name: resolveWorktreeLocalPaths
nodes.summary: Resolves all local filesystem paths for a worktree (config, logs, Postgres data, backup, secrets key) relative to the worktree home directory.

nodes.name: worktree-merge-history-lib.ts
nodes.summary: Library implementing the complete worktree merge history planning algorithm: parsing merge scopes, sorting entities (issues, documents, attachments), and building a comprehensive merge plan object.

nodes.name: buildWorktreeMergePlan
nodes.summary: Exported function that builds the full merge plan by querying source and target databases, diffing issues, documents, and attachments, and determining insert/update/skip actions.

nodes.name: sortIssuesForImport
nodes.summary: Sorts issues topologically so parents are always imported before their children, resolving dependency order for hierarchical issue trees.

nodes.name: worktree.ts
nodes.summary: Comprehensive 3300-line module implementing all CLI worktree commands: init, make, cleanup, env, list, merge-history, reseed, and repair, covering Git worktree management, database seeding, storage syncing, and cross-instance merging.
nodes.languageNotes: Largest file in the CLI at 3342 lines with 82 functions; handles complex multi-step worktree lifecycle including embedded Postgres management and S3/local storage abstraction.

nodes.name: runWorktreeInit
nodes.summary: Core worktree initialization logic: creates Git worktree, sets up config/secrets, starts embedded Postgres, seeds database, pauses routines, and quarantines execution state.

nodes.name: worktreeMakeCommand
nodes.summary: Exported command handler for `worktree make`: resolves target path, validates git state, and calls runWorktreeInit to create a new worktree.

nodes.name: worktreeCleanupCommand
nodes.summary: Exported command handler for `worktree cleanup`: interactively or automatically removes git worktrees, stops embedded Postgres, and cleans up associated directories.

nodes.name: collectMergePlan
nodes.summary: Orchestrates collection of a full merge plan by connecting to source and target databases, resolving company mappings, and building the diff-based merge plan.

nodes.name: applyMergePlan
nodes.summary: Executes a merge plan by applying all inserts and updates for issues, documents, attachments, and related entities from source to target database.

nodes.name: registerWorktreeCommands
nodes.summary: Exported function that registers all worktree subcommands (init, make, cleanup, env, list, merge-history, reseed, repair) on the Commander program.

nodes.name: seedWorktreeDatabase
nodes.summary: Seeds a new worktree's database by copying schema and data from the source instance, including storage object migration.

nodes.name: data-dir.ts
nodes.summary: Provides the applyDataDirOverride utility for overriding all data directory config values (Postgres, logs, storage, backups) from a single base directory path.

nodes.name: applyDataDirOverride
nodes.summary: Exported function that mutates a config object to override all local data directory paths with subdirectories under a given base path.

nodes.name: env.ts
nodes.summary: Utilities for reading, writing, and merging Paperclip and agent JWT environment files (.env), including secret generation and env file format handling.

nodes.name: ensureAgentJwtSecret
nodes.summary: Ensures an agent JWT secret exists by reading it from the env file or generating and persisting a new cryptographic secret.

nodes.name: mergePaperclipEnvEntries
nodes.summary: Merges new key-value pairs into the existing Paperclip env file, replacing existing keys and appending new ones.

nodes.name: home.ts
nodes.summary: Core home directory resolution module that computes all standard Paperclip instance paths (~/.paperclip/<instanceId>/) for config, logs, secrets, storage, Postgres, and backups.

nodes.name: hostnames.ts
nodes.summary: Utilities for normalizing and parsing hostname configuration values, including comma-separated hostname lists and wildcard validation.

nodes.name: schema.ts
nodes.summary: Zod-based configuration schema definitions for all Paperclip config sections (database, LLM, logging, server, auth, storage, secrets) with inferred TypeScript types.
nodes.languageNotes: Pure schema file with 28 exports — all Zod schemas and inferred TypeScript types. No runtime logic.

nodes.name: secrets-key.ts
nodes.summary: Ensures a local secrets encryption key file exists at the configured path, generating and persisting a new cryptographic key if absent.

nodes.name: ensureLocalSecretsKeyFile
nodes.summary: Exported function that checks for an existing secrets key file and generates a new 256-bit AES key if none is found, persisting it securely.

nodes.name: server-bind.ts
nodes.summary: Resolves server binding configuration for quickstart and custom modes, supporting localhost, LAN, Tailscale (tailnet), and custom hostname/port presets.

nodes.name: resolveQuickstartServerConfig
nodes.summary: Resolves the full server binding config for the onboarding wizard based on user-selected preset (localhost/LAN/tailnet/custom) or detects Tailscale availability.

nodes.name: store.ts
nodes.summary: Config file persistence layer that reads, writes, validates, and migrates the Paperclip config JSON file, including ancestor-directory search and legacy migration.

nodes.name: readConfig
nodes.summary: Reads and parses the config file at the given path, migrating legacy formats and validating against the Zod schema.

nodes.name: migrateLegacyConfig
nodes.summary: Migrates old config formats by renaming deprecated keys to their current equivalents, ensuring backward compatibility.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: CLI entry point that defines the top-level Commander program, registers all command modules, and invokes the main function as the executable shebang entry.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Main entry function that parses CLI arguments via Commander, catching unhandled errors and exiting with a non-zero code on failure.

nodes.name: database.ts
nodes.summary: Interactive @clack/prompts wizard for collecting and validating database configuration settings (embedded vs external Postgres, connection strings, migrations, backups).

nodes.name: promptDatabase
nodes.summary: Exported prompt handler that walks the user through database setup choices and returns a validated DatabaseConfig object.

nodes.name: llm.ts
nodes.summary: Interactive prompt for configuring the LLM provider and API key used by Paperclip agents.

nodes.name: promptLlm
nodes.summary: Exported prompt handler that collects LLM provider selection and API key from the user, returning a validated LlmConfig object.

nodes.name: logging.ts
nodes.summary: Interactive prompt for selecting the logging configuration (log level and output mode) for a Paperclip instance.

nodes.name: secrets.ts
nodes.summary: Interactive prompt for configuring the secrets storage backend (local encrypted file or custom) and provides the default secrets config factory.

nodes.name: promptSecrets
nodes.summary: Exported prompt handler that collects secrets backend preferences from the user, returning a validated SecretsConfig object.
